      "question": "In a multiple-processor system, the load balancing algorithm is used to divide the workload among multiple processors. Which of the following algorithms is an example of load balancing?",
      "options": [
        "A) FCFS",
        "B) SJF",
        "C) Round Robin",
        "D) Priority Scheduling"
      ],
      "correct": 1,
      "explanation": "Round Robin algorithm is used to divide the workload among multiple processors in a multiple-processor
